text: Which one of the listed requirements regarding LSA do not corresponds to present regulations?

options.text: All prescribed LSA shall be made of non-combustible or fire retardant material
All prescribed LSA shall be of a highly visible colour
All prescribed LSA shall be fitted with a retro reflective material which will assist in detection
All prescribed LSA shall be resistant to deterioration where exposed to sunlight

explanation: LSA is generally required to be fire-resistant; however, the term 'non-combustible' is a strict standard that may not apply to all individual components of every piece of life-saving equipment.
